name: Investment Memo Craft
description_en: Writing and layout overlay for investment research reports: financial rigor, business mechanics, contrarian analysis, valuation, and clear buy/hold/sell signals.
description_zh: 投资研究报告的写作与排版覆盖层：金融严谨性、商业机制、逆向分析、估值与清晰的买入/持有/卖出信号。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection (Codex-optimized). It improves the structure, typography, and readability of company/industry/fund research memos while preserving financial rigor and contrarian framing.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一（针对 Codex 优化）。在保持金融严谨性与逆向框架的前提下，改进公司/行业/基金研究备忘录的结构、排版与可读性。
sec_note_en: Reads and rewrites Markdown reports locally. No network access or external accounts required for core formatting.
sec_note_zh: 在本地读取并重写 Markdown 报告。核心排版无需联网或外部账号。
